content.cn_text: 关于产品开发的研究。
content.en_text: research he is doing on product development.

content.cn_text: 首先，您将有一些时间查看问题21至25。
content.en_text: First you have some time to look at questions 21 to 25.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听并回答问题21至25。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 21 to 25.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 你好，爱德华，请坐。
content.en_text: [Tutor]: Hello Edward, sit down.

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 谢谢。我需要一些关于我产品开发演示的建议。
content.en_text: [Edward]: Thanks. I need some advice on my presentation about product development.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 好的。你决定好重点了吗？
content.en_text: [Tutor]: Right. Have you decided what to focus on?

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 是的。我选择的产品是一种特殊的蚊帐。
content.en_text: [Edward]: Yes. The product I've chosen is a particular type of mosquito net.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 选择它的原因是什么？
content.en_text: [Tutor]: Any reason for choosing that?

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 去年夏天我和一个朋友在非洲旅行。
content.en_text: [Edward]: I spent last summer traveling around Africa with a friend.

content.cn_text: 他学医。所以当我们在蚊子引起疟疾的地区时，
content.en_text: He's studying medicine. So when we're in a region where mosquitoes cause malaria,

content.cn_text: 我们参观了一个医疗中心。我跟一位行政人员聊了聊，而我的朋友则跟一位医生谈话。
content.en_text: we visited a medical center. I chatted to an administrator while my friend talked to one of the doctors.

content.cn_text: 我发现自从这些蚊帐在当地普及以来，疟疾病例大大减少了。
content.en_text: And I found out they've had far fewer cases of malaria since these mosquito nets became available locally.

content.cn_text: 这让我对它们产生了兴趣。
content.en_text: That made me interested in them.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 好的。蚊帐的历史相当悠久，不是吗？
content.en_text: [Tutor]: Okay. Mosquito nets have quite a long history, don't they?

content.cn_text: 我认为它们在日本已经使用了几个世纪。
content.en_text: I believe they've been used in Japan for centuries.

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 没错。不过显然，埃及艳后克利奥帕特拉在古埃及曾睡在蚊帐下。那可能就是蚊帐的发明地。
content.en_text: [Edward]: That's right. Though apparently, Queen Cleopatra slept under one in ancient Egypt. That was probably where they were invented.

content.cn_text: 那可能就是它们的发明地。
content.en_text: That was probably where they were invented.

content.cn_text: 后来，蚊帐在中国也被使用。
content.en_text: And much later, nets were used in China.

content.cn_text: 所以它们可能是在那里独立发明的。
content.en_text: So perhaps they were invented there independently.

content.cn_text: 最初它们是用丝绸制作的，后来改用棉花，现在它们主要由合成材料制成。
content.en_text: Originally, they were made of silk, but later cotton was used, and nowadays they're mainly synthetic.

content.cn_text: 直到20世纪中叶，他们才开发出用于军事用途的经杀虫剂处理的蚊帐，这是一个重大进步。
content.en_text: It wasn't until the middle of the 20th century that they developed nets treated with insecticides for use by the military, and that was a major step forward.

content.cn_text: 他们使用了一种名为DDT的杀虫剂，但后来发现这种物质对人类和蚊子都有害。
content.en_text: They used an insecticide called DDT, but it was later found that this could be harmful to people as well as mosquitoes.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 现代蚊帐仍然存在这个问题吗？
content.en_text: [Tutor]: Is that still a problem with modern nets?

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 哦不。现在使用的化学品是安全的，即使人们每晚睡在它们下面。
content.en_text: [Edward]: Oh no. The chemicals used nowadays are safe, even if people sleep under them every night.

content.cn_text: 蚊帐有效，而且它们是免费的。
content.en_text: And the nets work, and they're out of free.

content.cn_text: 但它们必须经常用化学品处理，而这需要蚊帐的主人自己动手。
content.en_text: But they have to be treated fairly often with the chemical, which the owners need to do themselves.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 想必，化学品的分配在偏远地区可能是一个问题。
content.en_text: [Tutor]: Presumably, distribution of the chemical can be a problem in remote areas.

content.cn_text: 我的意思是，人们可能不容易获得它。
content.en_text: I mean, people may not be able to get hold of it easily.

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 没错。
content.en_text: [Edward]: That's right.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 好的，给我讲讲你要谈论的这种蚊帐吧。
content.en_text: [Tutor]: Okay, tell me about this net you're going to talk about.

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 嗯，品牌名称是OliSet，这个产品是由一家日本公司发明的。
content.en_text: [Edward]: Well, the brand name is OliSet, and the product was invented by a Japanese company.

content.cn_text: 这些蚊帐是对现有替代品的改进，因为杀虫剂包含在纤维内部，并逐渐释放。
content.en_text: These nets are an improvement on the alternatives, because the insecticide is contained inside the fiber, and released gradually.

content.cn_text: 它不像普通蚊帐那样涂在外表面。
content.en_text: It's not coated on the outside as with ordinary nets.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 那么化学品就不需要更换了？
content.en_text: [Tutor]: So the chemicals don't have to be replaced?

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 没错。OliSet蚊帐也更坚韧，不容易撕裂。
content.en_text: [Edward]: Right. And OliSet nets are also tougher, and don't tear as easily.

content.cn_text: 它们提供至少五年的保护，而其他蚊帐只有一两年。
content.en_text: They give protection for at least five years, compared with a year or two for other nets.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 嗯，听起来很有趣。
content.en_text: [Tutor]: Well, it sounds interesting.

content.cn_text: 但对于你的研讨会演示，你也会提供更宏观的背景吗？
content.en_text: But for your seminar presentation, will you provide the bigger picture as well?

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 是的，这将是一个产品开发的案例研究。
content.en_text: [Edward]: Yes, it'll be a case study of product development.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 在您听到讨论的其余部分之前，您将有一些时间查看问题26至30。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: Before you hear the rest of the discussion, you have some time to look at questions 26 to 30.

content.cn_text: 现在请听并回答问题26至30。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 26 to 30.

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 我想通过描述新产品的背景，即一般情境来介绍我的演示。
content.en_text: [Edward]: I thought I'd introduce my presentation by describing the background to the new product, the general context.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 你是说商业背景吗？投资来自哪里之类的？
content.en_text: [Tutor]: You mean the business context? Where the investments coming from and that sort of thing?

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 嗯，我原以为我会先谈谈虫媒疾病，特别是疟疾，
content.en_text: [Edward]: Well, I was thinking I'd talk first about insect-borne diseases, particularly malaria,

content.cn_text: 以及为什么迫切需要新的防治方法。
content.en_text: and why there's such an urgent need for new ways of fighting it.

content.cn_text: 有些人可能对此了解不多。
content.en_text: Some people might not know much about it.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 是的，这是个好主意。
content.en_text: [Tutor]: Yes, that's a good idea.

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 我有一些关于每年全球患病人数的统计数据。
content.en_text: [Edward]: I've got some statistics about the numbers of people worldwide who get the disease each year.

content.cn_text: 我想我会展示那些数据。它们相当惊人。
content.en_text: I thought I'd show those. They're quite staggering.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 我可以想象，毕竟这是世界上最大的健康问题之一。
content.en_text: [Tutor]: I can imagine it's one of the world's biggest health problems after all.

content.cn_text: 如果你能找到一些关于疟疾如何影响各国经济产出的统计信息并在演示中呈现，那也会很有用。
content.en_text: It'd also be useful if you could find some statistical information on how malaria affects countries' economic output

content.cn_text: 并将其呈现出来。
content.en_text: and present that too.

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 好的，我肯定能找到一些。
content.en_text: [Edward]: Okay, I'm sure I can find something.

content.cn_text: 之后，我将谈论蚊帐。
content.en_text: After that, I'll talk about mosquito nets.

content.cn_text: 首先，简要介绍其历史发展，然后我将介绍Oleset蚊帐。
content.en_text: First, the historical development, just briefly, and then I'll introduce the Oleset mosquito net.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 是的，保持简单。你可以只列出它的特点，
content.en_text: [Tutor]: Yes, keep it simple. You could just present a bulleted list of its characteristics,

content.cn_text: 它与其他类型蚊帐的不同之处，并详细讲解。
content.en_text: the things that make it different from other types of net and talk that through.

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 好的。然后我想我会概述生产过程。
content.en_text: [Edward]: Right. Then I thought I'd outline the production process.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Tutor]: Fine.

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 我应该提供一些关于项目资金来源的信息吗？
content.en_text: [Edward]: Should I give some information about where the money for the project has come from?

content.cn_text: 有很多政府和私人赞助商。
content.en_text: There are lots of government and private sponsors.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 当然。那是任何产品开发非常重要的一方面。
content.en_text: [Tutor]: Definitely. That's a very important aspect of any product development.

content.cn_text: 顺便问一下，这些蚊帐在哪里生产的？
content.en_text: Where are the nets being manufactured, by the way?

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 超过一半是由坦桑尼亚一家名为A to Z的公司生产的。
content.en_text: [Edward]: Over half are made in Tanzania by a company called A to Z.

content.cn_text: 他们获得了一笔无息贷款来购买必要的机器。
content.en_text: They got an interest-free loan to buy in the necessary machinery.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 嗯，我也会提一下公司简介，
content.en_text: [Tutor]: Well, I'd say a bit about the company profile as well,

content.cn_text: 然后提供关于员工数量的数字
content.en_text: and then present figures about numbers of staff

content.cn_text: 以及他们在Oleset项目上雇佣的各类人员
content.en_text: and the kinds of people they're employing on the Oleset project

content.cn_text: 如果你能找到详细信息的话。
content.en_text: if you can find the details.

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 好的。我还没有包括任何关于营销的信息。
content.en_text: [Edward]: Okay. I haven't included any information about marketing.

content.cn_text: 我有很多关于它的笔记，但我不知道如何展示它们。
content.en_text: I've got a lot of notes about it, but I'm not sure how to present them.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 如果是我，我就不会提那个。
content.en_text: [Tutor]: I wouldn't mention that if I were you.

content.cn_text: 你演示的时间很短，
content.en_text: You've only got a short time for your presentation,

content.cn_text: 而且你这里已经有很多材料了。
content.en_text: and you've got quite a lot of material here already.

content.cn_text: 但你应该提供一些关于产出的数字。
content.en_text: But you should provide some figures about output.

content.cn_text: 你从公司网站上查到他们实际生产了多少蚊帐吗？
content.en_text: Have you found out from the company's website how many nets they actually produce?

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 是的，每年超过3000万。
content.en_text: [Edward]: Yes, it's over 30 million a year.

content.cn_text: [导师]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Tutor]: Right.

content.cn_text: [爱德华]: 然后我不确定如何收尾。
content.en_text: [Edward]: Then I'm not sure how to finish off.

content.cn_text: 你觉得加入一些关于潜力的内容怎么样？
content.en_text: What do you think about including something on potential?

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 第三部分到此结束。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: That is the end of part three.

content.cn_text: 现在你有30秒时间检查第三部分的答案。
content.en_text: You now have 30 seconds to check your answers to part three.

content.cn_text: 谢谢。
content.en_text: Thank you.

content.cn_text: 谢谢。
content.en_text: Thank you.

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.
groups.title: Questions 21-25.

items.title: Edward heard about a type of mosquito net from
Edward believes that mosquito nets were first used in
Chemical treatment of mosquito nets in the mid-twentieth century

options.title: A
options.content: was first developed by a soldier.

options.title: B
options.content: made them potentially dangerous to users.

options.title: C
options.content: was made possible by modern textiles.

options.title: A
options.content: are likely to find they have an unpleasant smell.

options.title: B
options.content: should avoid using them every night.

options.title: C

items.title: According to Edward, Olyset nets are better than other nets because they

options.title: B
options.content: use a greater number of chemicals.

options.title: C
options.content: give protection against more types of insects.

items.title: profile of manufacturer with description of _____.
